title: More Accusations from the Zubayri Family against Ya1 ya b. 'Abdallah al-'Alawi
description: against Yahyd b. 'Abdallah al-'Alawi Bakker b. 'Abdallah b. Mu$'ab happened to be present at the court session, and he went up to Yahya b. `Abdallah, confronting him face-to-face, and said, "You have separated yourself from the community of Muslims (literally, "you have split the staff") and have abandoned the majority body [al-jamaah] (i.e., the majority Sunni [620] community); you have opposed our doctrine and have planned designs on our Caliph, and you have acted in…

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
